summary.para: A valid API key for your Nvidia endpoint. Can be found in API Keys section of Nvidia account settings.
For a text_embedding task, the maximum number of tokens per input. Inputs exceeding this value are truncated prior to sending to the Nvidia API.
The name of the model to use for the inference task. Refer to the model's documentation for the name if needed. Service has been tested and confirmed to be working with the following models:

item.para: For completion and chat_completion tasks - microsoft/phi-3-mini-128k-instruct.
For rerank task - nv-rerank-qa-mistral-4b:1. Service doesn't support text_embedding task baai/bge-m3 and nvidia/nvclip models due to them not recognizing the input_type parameter.

summary.para: This setting helps to minimize the number of rate limit errors returned from the Nvidia API. By default, the nvidia service sets the number of requests allowed per minute to 3000.
For a text_embedding task, the similarity measure. One of cosine, dot_product, l2_norm.
The URL of the Nvidia model endpoint. If not provided, the default endpoint URL is used depending on the task type:
